per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student identified several key issues but missed some critical aspects related to generalization and the impact of class imbalance on AUC-ROC.
The student correctly identified issues with the use of metrics but did not fully explore their implications, especially regarding generalization.
The analysis was solid but could have been more comprehensive in connecting identified issues to overall model performance and improvement strategies.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding by identifying several key issues but missed some critical aspects and did not fully explore the implications of evaluation metrics.
